calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Frances Heredia, Esq. of Simas & Associates, LTD (tel: 805-547-9300), seeking to withdraw.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PETITIONER JIALIANG DONG.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion, the Court grants counsel's motion for withdrawal.

Counsel Frances Heredia is to prepare and submit a proposed order on the mandatory judicial council form (MC-053).

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
